hardness_axes.name: Discover
hardness_axes.reasoning: Solver must infer which artifact surface is authoritative, how generation state survives a restart boundary, and how rollback phases reorder lineage—none of which are named as patch recipes in the constraint-complete instruction.

hardness_axes.name: Synthesize
hardness_axes.reasoning: Ingest tagging, surface selection, and row assembly must be coordinated with fixtures, schemas, and cross-format digest rules across three package roots.

hardness_axes.name: Diagnose or Design/Search
hardness_axes.reasoning: Constrained-build contract discloses acceptance behavior but requires design search to satisfy coupled invariants across replay and rollback without a provided algorithm.

hardness_axes.name: Navigate coupling
hardness_axes.reasoning: Tightening health-summary paths without fixing selection or assembly breaks idempotent reruns, fork-branch comparisons, or digest-chain tests.

hardness_axes.name: Reason beyond training
hardness_axes.reasoning: Incremental rebuild drift with false-green summaries and competing artifact views is not reducible to a single textbook reconciliation recipe.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Disclosure-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: After all tested formulas and schemas are visible, residual work requires coordinating three behavioral roots and cross-format invariants—not transcription.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hidden-instance
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Multiple fixtures and scenario classes exercise the same bug class; no single hidden file/record is the difficulty.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Single-artifact repair
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Flipping contract spans three modules; one manifest or checksum flip cannot pass the union of tests.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Generalization
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Tests cover distinct replay interleavings, rollback overlap, and fork branches—not one named broken row.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Prompt-honesty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honest constraint-complete prompt does not name canonical surface, generation-clearing site, or merge ordering.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Cheating-vs-difficulty
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Anti-cheat (regen-only, no static JSON) supports fairness but difficulty comes from multi-authority coupling.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Mechanical-fix filter
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a deps/timeout/footer task; core weakness is semantic reconciliation drift.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Localized-fix
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Three-root frontier with 33% test concentration each blocks single-function exploit.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Oracle-locality
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Oracle must touch generation tagging, surface selection, and row assembly—not one wholesale file.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Small declarative-cluster
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Solve is not one tiny policy table; behavior spans code paths and cross-format emission.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Grep-collapse
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Opaque package stems and code_forbidden_tokens block instruction-noun grep to fix symbols.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Pre-factored-helper
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Fix symbols are opaque (fn_k3, fn_r8, fn_x5); decoys absorb recipe-shaped names.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Recipe-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Not a standard safe-extractor or jail recipe; requires reading driver, docs, and modules.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Security-aura discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Debugging/reconciliation domain without security-keyword hardness inflation.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Orthogonal-checklist
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Generation survival, canonical selection, and digest linkage trade off—partial fixes fail distinct test clusters.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Harness-discount
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Single-container local harness is realism, not the hardness source.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: One-pass solvability
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Requires running replay/rollback scenarios and tracing cross-surface disagreement past false-green summaries.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Hard-only gate
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: Honestly hard: long-horizon reconciliation under destructive replay semantics.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Discovery/design budget test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: discovery_budget lists three non-trivial discoveries with planned locations and non-reveal rationale.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Instruction specificity test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: constraint-complete for constrained_build: public target and tested rules without solution recipe.

anti_trivialization_checks.name: Topology distribution test
anti_trivialization_checks.reasoning: topology_enumeration lists three distinct topologies each with >=3 coordinated locations.

rubric_axes.name: Verifiable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Deterministic driver, fixtures, and pytest derive verdicts from observation records.

rubric_axes.name: Well-specified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Command, output path, schemas, and field guide bound equivalent implementations.

rubric_axes.name: Solvable
rubric_axes.reasoning: Expert human can satisfy contract in hours using local docs and code.

rubric_axes.name: Difficult
rubric_axes.reasoning: Requires professional distributed-reconciliation reasoning, not undergrad checklist work.

rubric_axes.name: Interesting
rubric_axes.reasoning: Mirrors real incremental build coordinator incidents with economic ops value.

rubric_axes.name: Outcome-verified
rubric_axes.reasoning: Grades regenerated report invariants, not prescribed edit sequence.

instruction_completeness_test.reasoning: Instruction discloses acceptance contract but not authoritative surface, generation-clearing mechanism, or assembly recipe; solver must engage codebase, fixtures, and field_guide.md.

discovery_budget.discovery: Stale generation tags survive one restart boundary while short-horizon summaries still look healthy
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Naming the boundary-clearing site collapses search to one conditional in the tagging module.

discovery_budget.discovery: Competing artifact views are each locally coherent but only one surface may feed externally tested rows
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Stating which view wins reduces distributed_reconciliation to a one-line precedence flip.

discovery_budget.discovery: Cross-format span digests must bind ledger bytes to report waves through rollback-overlap windows
discovery_budget.why_instruction_must_not_reveal: Publishing the exact assembly recipe makes the task spec-complete implementation.

instruction_specificity.reasoning: Public contract states commands, outputs, invariants, and schema homes while withholding construction path and patch sites required for constrained_build hardness.

attack_path.summary: Static report write or single-module generation bump
attack_path.reasoning: Blocked by regeneration rule, digest-chain derivation from docs, and three-root flipping subsets; health-summary-only patches fail later-wave tests.

smallest_plausible_patch.summary: Flip one trust bit on summaries or bump one generation counter
smallest_plausible_patch.reasoning: Insufficient: selection and assembly tests require coordinated fixes across m2p and w9n; idempotence and fork-branch tests catch naive clears.

collapse_audit.reasoning: Post-disclosure residual work maps to interacting authorities and cross-format obligations, not one obvious function per rule.
collapse_audit.residual_hardness: After formulas and schemas are visible, solver must still discover authoritative surface, generation survival across boundaries, and rollback-safe assembly coordination.

topology_enumeration.why_no_single_location_suffices: Tagging-only fix leaves wrong canonical surface and breaks digest_chain and fork_branch tests.
Selection-only fix fails tseq_alpha and idempo_twice when generation tags remain stale across boundary.
Assembly-only fix cannot pass restore_overlap without correct upstream generation and view choice.

symbol_table.purpose: Tags generation state across replay segments before persistence.
Selects reconciler inputs among competing artifact surfaces.
Builds report-visible rows and cross-format digest fields.

decoy_manifest.non_fix_purpose: Alternate batching heuristics for cold-cache simulations.
Toy merge demos for docs examples.

renames_during_drafting.reason: Avoided forbidden instruction noun restart as substring in planned test name.

difficulty_mechanism_plan.why_model_misses_it: naive idempotence keys reuse stale tags

calibration_plan.human_sanity: diff two report generations after replays
calibration_plan.shortcut_audit: static JSON, single-location reverts, test edits
calibration_plan.ablation_plan: drop regen, replay sequencing, or row assembly separately

metrics.criterion: replay and rollback scenarios produce coherent report rows
cross-format digest linkage and generation lineage

verifier_scoring_plan.binary_threshold_rule: reward.txt is 1 only when all semantic tests pass

fix_frontier.distribution: c7k generation tagging, m2p surface selection, w9n row assembly
fix_frontier.naming_policy: opaque stems; instruction nouns banned on fix path

task_shape.hardness_source: design search under distributed reconciliation constraints
task_shape.collapse_risk: leaking replay ordering or authoritative path enables one-file repair

category_profile.allowed_instruction_disclosures: authorities, scenarios, driver, report path, idempotence class
category_profile.forbidden_instruction_leaks: canonical source, merge algorithm, patch sites
category_profile.category_specific_hardness_bar: multiple truth surfaces with idempotency and lineage
category_profile.category_specific_verifier_risks: golden fixtures, count-only checks, GX9 saturation
category_profile.coverage_role: constrained-build incremental rebuild drift in distributed_reconciliation

satisfiability_risk.rc2_planned_name_risk: medium — opaque stems and noun ban; risk if descriptive dirs reintroduced
satisfiability_risk.gx9_contract_risk: medium — rich rows need derivations not answer triples
satisfiability_risk.cr1_symbol_frontier_risk: medium — three thin symbols across roots
satisfiability_risk.hidden_contract_risk: low — formulas and schemas in field_guide and schema fragments

actionability_plan.verifier_command_visible: run_cycle.sh and rebuild_report.json with regen rule
actionability_plan.generated_output_rule_visible: tests delete report and rerun driver

waiver_plan.waiver_rationale: no waivers expected with standard naming and observation contract

realism_source.minimization_preserves: false greens, competing views, replay/rollback lineage
realism_source.synthetic_exception_review: distributed_reconciliation profile; constraint-complete instruction; observation contract; GX9/GX10 scrutiny
